### Portfolio Audit

# kitbag — Portfolio Audit

_Generated by the autonomous multi-agent orchestrator on 2026-07-07 09:06:17._

## Original Prompt

```
PORTFOLIO_CHILD_PROJECT: true
Parent portfolio: batch-cat-b3
Selected app slug: kitbag

Build this app as a working local-first SwiftUI MVP.

## Selected App Spec

# Kitbag

Build mode: **MVP build**.
Build priority: **4**.

## App Name

Kitbag

## Category

Travel

## One-Sentence Promise

A packing list that learns from your own trip history instead of handing you a generic template.

## Target User

Frequent travelers who over- or under-pack and want a personal system rather than a one-size-fits-all checklist.

## Painful Moment Solved

Staring at a blank generic packing checklist the night before a trip and forgetting the same things every time.

## Why It Is Different

Builds lists from your own packing/usage history captured via a quick post-trip review, and uses bundled offline climate-normal data by month and region instead of a live weather feed.

## Why Users Would Pay

Unlimited trip history, deeper post-trip analytics, list export/share to travel companions, premium curated templates for niche trip types.

## Subscription Model

Free: 3 trips of history, basic list. Paid: unlimited history/analytics/premium templates.

## Local-First MVP Scope

Entirely on-device trip and packing history, with a bundled offline climate-normal reference table.

## Future Backend Roadmap

Optional cloud backup/sync of trip history; potential live-weather enhancement layered on later, never required.

## AR / Local ML / Local LLM Fit

On-device weighting of list suggestions from personal packing history; optional on-device LLM phrasing of suggestions.

## Design Direction

Crisp, modern travel-editorial look with destination-photo headers — a boutique travel planner, not a generic checklist app.

## App Store Positioning

The packing list that actually learns from you — not a generic template.

## Invalidation Criteria

If post-trip review completion stays very low, the self-improving loop can't function and the app should be redesigned around a faster review prompt.

## v1 Build Scope

Trip creation, smart default list by type/region, checklist UI, post-trip review, personal insights.

## Core Workflows

- Create a trip (destination, dates, type)
- Generate a smart packing list
- Check off items while packing
- Post-trip review of what went unused
- Browse personal packing insights over time

## iOS-Native Features

- Widgets for days-until-trip and packing progress
- Live Activities for an active packing session
- App Intents/Siri to add items by voice

## Key Risks

- First trip has no history to learn from, so v1 must be useful with zero history via smart defaults
- Climate-normal data must be clearly labeled as historical averages, not a forecast

## Claude Design Handoff Prompt

Design a boutique travel-editorial packing app: a destination-photo-driven trip header, a clean smart-checklist view, and a lightweight post-trip review screen that feels quick, not like homework.

## Parent Portfolio Prompt

Build 9 completely separate production-ready iOS apps at the same time: exactly 3 Social Networking apps, 3 Travel apps, and 3 Utilities apps.

This is a multi-app PORTFOLIO request: multiple apps in one program. Each selected app becomes its own separate project — one folder per app.


Requirements for every app:
1. Must go from 0 to production-ready, not just a few features.
2. Must be unique, useful, and commercially viable.
3. Must be beautifully designed and feel premium.
4. Must provide real end-user value.
5. Must have a realistic path to monetization — a subscription or paid offering with genuine value (never cosmetics-only).
6. Should have viral potential (broad or niche) without sacrificing usefulness.
7. Must be better than its competitors in a meaningful way.
8. Local-first where applicable, architected so cloud support can be added later without rewriting.

UNIQUENESS (hard rule, non-negotiable):
- No app in this batch may be similar to another app in this batch.
- No app may be similar to anything already built or being built in this workspace or before, including: Waylay (location-based personal recall utility), TrueScale, Provenance, Scope-Guard, Practice-Loop, Proof, ReturnWise, VerveCoach, CueKeeper, Countertop, FieldQuote, my existing digital temple app, and my existing PO-automation tool.
- No app may be similar to apps in the OTHER batches of this program (check sibling project folders in the workspace for their concepts).
- Do not reuse prior concepts, themes, or mechanics from earlier apps — even if the request sounds similar to something built before, produce a differentiated concept.

Bonus points (optional — only when integral and genuinely valuable, never forced): unique use of LLMs, AR, or ML.

Build rules:
- Run the app efforts in parallel; keep discussion/design phases separate per app.
- Each app gets its own full product direction, design direction, architecture, implementation plan, and build output.
- Save all phase discussions and final decisions; at the end combine each app's full transcript into a .txt file.
- If an app is liked, also prepare Jira board + Notion project structures for backfilling later.
- Use enough rounds per phase for high-quality discussion, ending early on consensus.
- Recover cleanly from stalls; report only important milestones.

Output:
- One folder per app in the output directory — never one folder containing all apps.
Output directory:
- /Users/pchordia/Documents/iOS-App-Factory

Now generate at least 18 candidate ideas, discuss them thoroughly, choose the best 9, and build all 9 to production quality.
```

## Phase Purpose

For multi-app prompts, audit the portfolio shape: every requested app is a sibling folder, every selected app has the right workflow, child prompts preserve the parent requirements, and no category was silently collapsed. For single-app prompts, record that portfolio audit is not applicable.


## Interface Contracts

```json
{
  "interfaces": [
    {
      "name": "TripContextSnapshot",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "struct TripContextSnapshot { let tripID: UUID; let destinationKey: String; let fallbackClimateZoneKey: String?; let startDate: Date; let endDate: Date; let resolvedMonth: Int; let tripType: TripType; let modifiers: TripModifiers; let status: TripStatus }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Pure value snapshot used as input to generation; no SwiftData types allowed."
    },
    {
      "name": "TripType",
      "kind": "enum",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "enum TripType: String, Codable, CaseIterable { case business, cityWeekend, beachWarm, coldWinter, outdoorHiking, familyKids }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Closed six-item taxonomy."
    },
    {
      "name": "TripStatus",
      "kind": "enum",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "enum TripStatus: String, Codable, CaseIterable { case planned, completed, didNotHappen }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Preferred over bare didHappen Bool because it closes invalid future migrations and keeps the cancellation path explicit."
    },
    {
      "name": "TripModifiers",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "struct TripModifiers: Equatable { let carryOnOnly: Bool; let laundryAccess: Bool }",
      "owning_lane": "primary_ui",
      "notes": "Small stable input surface for generation rules."
    },
    {
      "name": "ClimateSummary",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "struct ClimateSummary: Codable, Equatable { let regionKey: String; let month: Int; let averageHighC: Double; let averageLowC: Double; let precipitationBand: PrecipitationBand; let copyLabel: String }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Historical average only; copyLabel should already contain compliant wording basis."
    },
    {
      "name": "PrecipitationBand",
      "kind": "enum",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "enum PrecipitationBand: String, Codable { case dry, moderate, wet }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Derived, not stored \u2014 computed from raw ClimateNormal for the engine's coarse decision rules."
    },
    {
      "name": "HistorySignalSnapshot",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "struct HistorySignalSnapshot: Codable, Equatable { let itemKey: String; let tripType: TripType?; let climateZoneKey: String?; let usageCount: Int; let unusedCount: Int; let manualAddCount: Int; let missingCount: Int; let lastReviewedAt: Date? }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Derived from reviewed trips only; input to weighting engine."
    },
    {
      "name": "PackingListArtifact",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "struct PackingListArtifact: Codable, Equatable { let tripID: UUID; let generatedAt: Date; let algorithmVersion: String; let sections: [PackingSectionArtifact]; let climateSummary: ClimateSummary; let isHistoryInfluenced: Bool }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Frozen generated snapshot persisted and rendered directly by UI."
    },
    {
      "name": "PackingSectionArtifact",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "struct PackingSectionArtifact: Codable, Equatable, Identifiable { let id: UUID; let title: String; let items: [PackingItemArtifact] }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Section grouping for checklist UI and export."
    },
    {
      "name": "PackingItemArtifact",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "struct PackingItemArtifact: Codable, Equatable, Identifiable { let id: UUID; let stableItemKey: String; let displayName: String; let quantity: Int; let source: PackingItemSource; let isChecked: Bool; let reason: SuggestionReason; let isChangedFromPreviousGeneration: Bool; let sortOrder: Int }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Reason and changed flag are frozen at generation/regeneration time."
    },
    {
      "name": "PackingItemSource",
      "kind": "enum",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "enum PackingItemSource: String, Codable { case suggested, custom }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Used for accessibility and UI distinction."
    },
    {
      "name": "SuggestionReason",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "struct SuggestionReason: Codable, Equatable { let kind: SuggestionReasonKind; let message: String; let evidenceCount: Int? }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Value-type shape produced by GenerationEngine, mapped onto PackingItem's reason fields at write time."
    },
    {
      "name": "SuggestionReasonKind",
      "kind": "enum",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "enum SuggestionReasonKind: String, Codable { case tripTypeDefault, climateDefault, repeatedManualAdd, reviewedHistoryPromoted, reviewedHistorySuppressed, quantityAdjusted }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Lets tests pin on reason category independent of exact wording."
    },
    {

      "language": "Swift",

      "owning_lane": "primary_ui",
      "notes": "UI-facing mutable draft before submission."
    },
    {
      "name": "ReviewOutcomeSnapshot",

      "language": "Swift",

      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Canonical submitted review payload used to rebuild learning history."
    },
    {
      "name": "ReviewedItemOutcome",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "struct ReviewedItemOutcome: Codable, Equatable { let stableItemKey: String; let outcome: ItemUsageOutcome }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Explicit review signal only; checklist checks are not usage truth."
    },
    {
      "name": "ItemUsageOutcome",
      "kind": "enum",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "enum ItemUsageOutcome: String, Codable { case used, unused, wishedPacked }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Supports future insight summaries without schema change."
    },
    {
      "name": "PackingListGenerating",
      "kind": "protocol",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "protocol PackingListGenerating { func generate(trip: TripContextSnapshot, climate: ClimateSummary, history: [HistorySignalSnapshot], previous: PackingListArtifact?) -> PackingListArtifact }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Pure deterministic engine; no persistence or UI dependencies."
    },
    {
      "name": "LearningHistoryBuilding",
      "kind": "protocol",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "protocol LearningHistoryBuilding { func buildHistorySignals(from reviews: [ReviewOutcomeSnapshot]) -> [HistorySignalSnapshot] }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Must support full deterministic recomputation after review edits."
    },
    {
      "name": "ClimateLookupProviding",
      "kind": "protocol",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "protocol ClimateLookupProviding { func climateSummary(for destinationKey: String, fallbackClimateZoneKey: String?, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) throws -> ClimateSummary }",
      "owning_lane": "services_utilities",
      "notes": "Owns majority-month resolution and fallback behavior."
    },
    {
      "name": "TripRepository",
      "kind": "protocol",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "protocol TripRepository { func fetchSummaries() throws -> [TripSummary]; func fetchTrip(id: UUID) throws -> Trip; func upsert(_ draft: TripDraft) throws -> UUID; func deleteTrip(tripID: UUID) throws; func markTripDidNotHappen(tripID: UUID) throws }",
      "owning_lane": "services_utilities",
      "notes": "SwiftData-backed storage boundary for trip lifecycle. markTripDidNotHappen sets didHappen=false, never deletes."
    },
    {
      "name": "TripDraft",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "struct TripDraft: Equatable { let tripID: UUID?; let destinationKey: String; let fallbackClimateZoneKey: String?; let startDate: Date; let endDate: Date; let tripType: TripType; let modifiers: TripModifiers }",
      "owning_lane": "primary_ui",
      "notes": "Shared create/edit form payload."
    },
    {
      "name": "TripSummary",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "struct TripSummary: Identifiable, Equatable { let id: UUID; let destinationDisplayName: String; let dateRangeText: String; let tripType: TripType; let progress: Double; let isLockedByFreeTier: Bool; let phase: TripPhase }",
      "owning_lane": "primary_ui",
      "notes": "Cheap list-facing projection; TripCard reads only this shape, never trip.items/trip.review."
    },
    {
      "name": "GeneratedListRepository",
      "kind": "protocol",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "protocol GeneratedListRepository { func loadItems(tripID: UUID) throws -> [PackingItem]; func replaceSuggestedItems(tripID: UUID, items: [PackingItem]) throws; func toggleChecked(tripID: UUID, itemID: UUID, isChecked: Bool) throws; func upsertCustomItem(tripID: UUID, name: String, quantity: Int, category: PackingCategory) throws; func removeItem(tripID: UUID, itemID: UUID) throws }",
      "owning_lane": "services_utilities",
      "notes": "Works against canonical PackingItem rows directly. toggleChecked must be a single targeted field write, not a full-list re-save \u2014 this is the perf-critical path during packing."
    },
    {
      "name": "CustomItemDraft",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "struct CustomItemDraft: Equatable { let itemID: UUID?; let displayName: String; let quantity: Int; let sectionTitle: String }",
      "owning_lane": "primary_ui",
      "notes": "Flat custom item model only; no taxonomy expansion."
    },
    {
      "name": "ReviewRepository",
      "kind": "protocol",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "protocol ReviewRepository { func loadReview(tripID: UUID) throws -> Review?; func saveReview(tripID: UUID, outcomes: [ReviewItemOutcome], wishIPacked: String?) throws }",
      "owning_lane": "services_utilities",
      "notes": "Full-overwrite save semantics so review edits stay deterministic (never incremental patching)."
    },
    {
      "name": "PackingCoordinator",
      "kind": "protocol",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "protocol PackingCoordinator { func createTripAndGenerate(_ draft: TripDraft) async throws -> UUID; func regenerateList(for tripID: UUID) async throws; func submitReview(tripID: UUID, outcomes: [ReviewItemOutcome], wishIPacked: String?) async throws; func rebuildAllDerivedState() async throws }",
      "owning_lane": "services_utilities",
      "notes": "Only cross-lane bridge between SwiftData models and the pure generator. async is call-site convenience only \u2014 internally these call the synchronous GenerationEngine.generate()/applyGenerationResult() on the main actor with no real suspension point. Never move generation to a background actor; the golden path must never show a spinner. rebuildAllDerivedState is required for edit recovery, migration repair, and QA verification."
    },
    {
      "name": "EntitlementSnapshot",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "struct EntitlementSnapshot: Equatable { let isPremiumActive: Bool; let activeProductID: String?; let lastVerifiedAt: Date?; let graceWindowEndsAt: Date? }",
      "owning_lane": "services_utilities",
      "notes": "Single entitlement state surface for gating and offline grace behavior."
    },
    {
      "name": "EntitlementStoreProtocol",
      "kind": "protocol",
      "language": "Swift",

      "owning_lane": "services_utilities",
      "notes": "Long-lived StoreKit observer listening to Transaction.updates, never a one-shot launch check."

      "owning_lane": "data_domain",

    },

      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",

    {
      "name": "AppError",

      "language": "Swift",

      "owning_lane": "polish_resilience",
      "notes": "Shared typed errors for reachable error states across UI and services."
    },
    {
      "name": "BuildVerificationChecklist",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "struct BuildVerificationChecklist { let verifiedCoreFlows: [String]; let unverifiableInHeadless: [String]; let knownLimitations: [String] }",
      "owning_lane": "polish_resilience",
      "notes": "Shared vocabulary for build verification and final review to report the same truth about what's actually working vs. flagged as a limitation."
    },
    {
      "name": "Trip",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "@Model final class Trip { var id: UUID; var destinationDisplayName: String; var regionOrZoneId: String?; var climateZoneFallbackId: String?; var startDate: Date; var endDate: Date; var tripType: TripType; var carryOnOnly: Bool; var laundryAccess: Bool; var didHappen: Bool; var createdAt: Date; var lastGeneratedAt: Date?; var generationAlgorithmVersion: Int?; @Relationship(deleteRule: .cascade) var items: [PackingItem]; @Relationship(deleteRule: .cascade) var review: Review? }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "didHappen is the sole persisted lifecycle fact, default true, flipped only by the explicit 'didn't happen' action, never by the clock. No persisted TripStatus/planned/completed enum."
    },
    {
      "name": "PackingItem",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "@Model final class PackingItem { var id: UUID; var trip: Trip?; var name: String; var category: PackingCategory; var isCustom: Bool; var isChecked: Bool; var quantity: Int; var reasonKind: SuggestionReasonKind?; var reasonMessage: String?; var reasonEvidenceCount: Int?; var isRecentlyChanged: Bool; var sortOrder: Int }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Reason fields + isRecentlyChanged frozen at generation/regeneration time, applied in one write, never live-recomputed. isCustom rows never touched by regeneration diffing."
    },
    {
      "name": "Review",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "@Model final class Review { var id: UUID; var trip: Trip?; var completedAt: Date; var wishIPacked: String?; @Relationship(deleteRule: .cascade) var itemOutcomes: [ReviewItemOutcome] }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "wishIPacked is a single free-text field disconnected from item identity \u2014 covers items never on the list at all."
    },
    {
      "name": "ReviewItemOutcome",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "@Model final class ReviewItemOutcome { var id: UUID; var review: Review?; var itemName: String; var category: PackingCategory; var wasUsed: Bool }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Plain Bool, not a 3-case enum. Only source of learning signal; packing checkmarks never write here."
    },
    {
      "name": "PackingCategory",
      "kind": "enum",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "enum PackingCategory: String, Codable, CaseIterable { case clothing, toiletries, electronics, documents, health, gear }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Closed checklist grouping set."
    },
    {
      "name": "ClimateNormal",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "struct ClimateNormal: Codable, Equatable { let regionOrZoneId: String; let month: Int; let averageHighC: Double; let averageLowC: Double; let averagePrecipitationMM: Double; let notes: String? }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Raw bundled data for climate-card display copy, always 'historical average', never forecast language."
    },
    {
      "name": "ClimateCatalog",
      "kind": "protocol",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "protocol ClimateCatalog { func normal(for regionOrZoneId: String, month: Int) -> ClimateNormal?; func allRegions() -> [RegionCatalogEntry]; func allFallbackZones() -> [ClimateZoneFallbackEntry] }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Loaded once in-memory at launch; CI test asserts full 12-month coverage per region/fallback zone."
    },
    {
      "name": "RegionCatalogEntry",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "struct RegionCatalogEntry: Codable, Identifiable, Equatable { let id: String; let displayName: String; let climateZoneFallbackId: String }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "~30-40 bundled destinations."
    },
    {
      "name": "ClimateZoneFallbackEntry",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "struct ClimateZoneFallbackEntry: Codable, Identifiable, Equatable { let id: String; let displayName: String }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Inline fallback shown the instant destination search returns zero matches. Search itself is synchronous in-memory filtering \u2014 no debounce, no async, no loading state."
    },
    {
      "name": "monthOfMajorityDays",
      "kind": "function",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "func monthOfMajorityDays(start: Date, end: Date, calendar: Calendar) -> Int",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Deterministic month-boundary resolution for climate lookup."
    },
    {
      "name": "GenerationInput",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "struct GenerationInput: Equatable { let tripType: TripType; let month: Int; let regionOrZoneId: String; let tripLengthDays: Int; let carryOnOnly: Bool; let laundryAccess: Bool; let climate: [ClimateNormal]; let learningHistory: LearningHistorySnapshot }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Fully snapshotted value type; nothing here is a live SwiftData reference."
    },
    {
      "name": "GenerationResult",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "struct GenerationResult: Equatable { struct SuggestedItem: Equatable { let name: String; let category: PackingCategory; let quantity: Int; let reason: SuggestionReason }; let items: [SuggestedItem]; let algorithmVersion: Int }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Pure output; never persisted as its own artifact table \u2014 applyGenerationResult maps it directly onto PackingItem rows."
    },
    {
      "name": "GenerationEngine",
      "kind": "protocol",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "protocol GenerationEngine { func generate(input: GenerationInput) -> GenerationResult }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "MUST stay synchronous, non-async, non-actor-isolated. This is the rule that keeps trip creation/regeneration feeling instant \u2014 never wrap it in Task or move it to a background actor."
    },
    {
      "name": "LearningHistorySnapshot",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "struct LearningHistorySnapshot: Equatable { struct ItemEvidence: Equatable { let itemName: String; let category: PackingCategory; let usedCount: Int; let unusedCount: Int; let lastSeenDate: Date }; let evidenceByItem: [ItemEvidence]; let minimumEvidenceCount: Int }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "minimumEvidenceCount = 2 same-type-or-region data points before a suggestion visibly shifts."
    },
    {
      "name": "LearningHistoryReader",
      "kind": "protocol",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "protocol LearningHistoryReader { func snapshot(for tripType: TripType, regionOrZoneId: String, context: ModelContext) throws -> LearningHistorySnapshot }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Always recomputes fresh from raw ReviewItemOutcome rows on trips where didHappen == true; never an incremental cache."
    },
    {
      "name": "isWithinFreeRetentionWindow",
      "kind": "function",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "func isWithinFreeRetentionWindow(tripId: UUID, tripDate: Date, allTripDatesById: [UUID: Date], isPaidEntitled: Bool) -> Bool",

    },
    {
      "name": "TabRoute",
      "kind": "enum",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "enum TabRoute: Hashable { case tripList, tripDetail(UUID), review(UUID), insights, settings, paywall }",
      "owning_lane": "primary_ui",

    },
    {
      "name": "DeepLinkRouter",
      "kind": "protocol",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "protocol DeepLinkRouter { func resolve(_ intent: PendingNavigationIntent, context: ModelContext) -> DeepLinkResolution }",
      "owning_lane": "services_utilities",
      "notes": "Prevents racing entry points (notification, widget, Siri) from independently mutating navigation state."
    },
    {
      "name": "ToastCenter",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",

    {
      "name": "ColorStory",
      "kind": "enum",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "enum ColorStory: CaseIterable { case hotArid, tropicalHumid, temperateMild, coldContinental, alpine, mediterranean; func hexPair() -> (primary: String, secondary: String); func textColor(onLuminance: Double) -> Color }",
      "owning_lane": "primary_ui",

      "owning_lane": "services_utilities",

    },
    {

      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "protocol NotificationScheduler { func scheduleReviewNudge(for tripId: UUID, at date: Date) }",
      "owning_lane": "services_utilities",
      "notes": "Best-effort only, generic copy, permission denial never blocks core flow."
    },
    {
      "name": "regenerateSuggestedItems",
      "kind": "function",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "func regenerateSuggestedItems(existing: [PackingItem], result: GenerationResult) -> [PackingItem]",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Rewrites suggested rows only. Keeps checked state when name and reason are unchanged; never touches custom rows."
    },
    {
      "name": "AccessibilityCollapseAdapter",
      "kind": "function",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "func collapsedHeaderStyle(colorStory: ColorStory, dynamicTypeSize: DynamicTypeSize, increaseContrast: Bool, reduceTransparency: Bool) -> HeaderRenderStyle",
      "owning_lane": "polish_resilience",
      "notes": "One shared 'collapse to flat/simple' mechanism reused across Dynamic Type XXL, Increase Contrast, and Reduce Transparency. layout and backgroundColors are set independently based on which trigger(s) are active."
    },
    {
      "name": "PersistenceBootstrap",
      "kind": "function",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "func makeModelContainer() throws -> ModelContainer",
      "owning_lane": "polish_resilience",
      "notes": "Builds VersionedSchema (SchemaV1)-backed container from first commit. Failure surfaces a full-bleed persistence-error state, never a crash."
    },
    {
      "name": "TripStatus/didHappen",
      "kind": "enum",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "OPEN: Codex proposes `enum TripStatus { planned, completed, didNotHappen }` on a value-type trip snapshot; Claude proposes `var didHappen: Bool` directly on the @Model Trip. Pick one.",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Both agree the semantics (soft-exclude, structurally filtered out of learning queries, never a delete) \u2014 only the representation differs. Must resolve next round."
    },
    {
      "name": "PackingItem/PackingItemArtifact",
      "kind": "struct|class",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "OPEN: Codex's `PackingItemArtifact` (value type, part of a persisted PackingListArtifact) vs Claude's `PackingItem` (@Model class with suggestionReason/isRecentlyChanged fields directly on the row). Pick one.",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Both agree reason+changed-flag must be frozen at generation/regeneration time and never live-recomputed; only where that frozen data physically lives differs."
    },
    {
      "name": "ReviewOutcome shape",
      "kind": "struct|class",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "OPEN: Codex's ReviewOutcomeSnapshot/ReviewedItemOutcome + ItemUsageOutcome enum (used/unused/wishedPacked) vs Claude's Review/ReviewItemOutcome (@Model, wasUsed: Bool) + separate wishIPacked: String? field on Review. Pick one.",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Functionally equivalent; needs one canonical shape so review UI and learning-history builder agree on a type."
    },
    {
      "name": "GenerationEngine contract",
      "kind": "protocol",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "OPEN: Codex's `PackingListGenerating.generate(trip:climate:history:previous:) -> PackingListArtifact` vs Claude's `GenerationEngine.generate(input: GenerationInput) -> GenerationResult`. Both agree: pure, synchronous, non-async, zero SwiftData/UI dependency, zero LLM.",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Naming/shape must converge; the 'must stay synchronous' rule is already locked and non-negotiable."
    },
    {
      "name": "ClimateNormal/ClimateSummary",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "OPEN: Codex's ClimateSummary (regionKey, month, averageHighC/LowC, PrecipitationBand, copyLabel) vs Claude's ClimateNormal (regionOrZoneId, month, averageHighC/LowC, averagePrecipitationMM, notes) + ClimateCatalog protocol. Similar shape, different field names/precision.",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Both agree: bundled JSON, loaded once in-memory, CI test asserts 12-month completeness per region/fallback zone, UI copy always 'historical average' never forecast."
    },
    {
      "name": "isWithinFreeRetentionWindow / HistoryAccessPolicy",
      "kind": "function",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "func isWithinFreeRetentionWindow(tripId: UUID, tripDate: Date, allTripDatesById: [UUID: Date], isPaidEntitled: Bool) -> Bool",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Both agree this must be relationship-free and take only id+date projections plus entitlement state, never fault in items/review."
    },
    {
      "name": "PendingNavigationIntent / DeepLinkRouter",
      "kind": "enum|protocol",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "enum PendingNavigationIntent { case openTrip(UUID); case openReview(UUID); case openSettings/openPaywall; case none }; protocol DeepLinkRouter { func resolve(_ intent: PendingNavigationIntent, context: ModelContext) -> DeepLinkResolution }; enum DeepLinkResolution { case route(TabRoute); case tripNotFound }",
      "owning_lane": "primary_ui",
      "notes": "Agreed by both: single app-root value, tripNotFound drives the same ToastCenter used for the changed-list moment."
    },
    {
      "name": "NotificationScheduler/NotificationScheduling",
      "kind": "protocol",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "protocol NotificationScheduler { func scheduleReviewNudge(for tripId: UUID, at date: Date) }",

      "notes": "Agreed: best-effort only, generic copy, permission denial never blocks core flow."
    },
    {
      "name": "DeepLinkResolution",
      "kind": "enum",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "enum DeepLinkResolution: Equatable { case route(TabRoute); case tripNotFound }",
      "owning_lane": "services_utilities",
      "notes": "Stale/deleted-trip deep links fail safely to Trip List and reuse the existing toast system, never crash/no-op."
    },
    {

      "language": "Swift",

    {

      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "func applyGenerationResult(_ result: GenerationResult, to trip: Trip, context: ModelContext) -> [PackingItem]",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Single write path for frozen suggestion facts. Matches suggested rows by name; unchanged reason keeps checked state and isRecentlyChanged=false; never touches isCustom rows."
    },
    {
      "name": "PackingItemSnapshot",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",

      "owning_lane": "services_utilities",

      "name": "EntitlementState",

      "owning_lane": "services_utilities",
      "notes": "Single entitlement gating snapshot."
    },
    {
      "name": "TripStatus (Codex's variant, OPEN)",
      "kind": "enum",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "enum TripStatus: String, Codable, CaseIterable { case planned, completed, didNotHappen }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Persisted on Trip.statusRaw in Codex's round-2 model. Contested by Claude \u2014 see TripPhase alternative below."
    },
    {
      "name": "TripPhase (Claude's variant, OPEN)",
      "kind": "enum",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "enum TripPhase { case upcoming, inProgressOrAwaitingReturn, awaitingReview, reviewed, didNotHappen }",
      "owning_lane": "data_domain",
      "notes": "Never persisted; computed via tripPhase(trip:now:) from endDate + review presence + didHappen, so it can't go stale. This is the alternative to Codex's persisted TripStatus \u2014 pick one next round."
    },
    {
      "name": "HeaderRenderStyle",
      "kind": "struct",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "struct HeaderRenderStyle: Equatable { let layout: HeaderLayoutVariant; let backgroundColors: [Color]; let textColor: Color }",
      "owning_lane": "polish_resilience",
      "notes": "RESOLVED (was the round-3 gate failure \u2014 undefined return type). backgroundColors has 2 elements for the normal gradient pair, or 1 when Increase Contrast/Reduce Transparency has flattened it to a single anchor color. Modeled as independent fields rather than a 3-case enum specifically because layout collapse and color flattening are separate accessibility settings that can both be active at once \u2014 a mutually-exclusive enum would force dropping one."
    },
    {
      "name": "HeaderLayoutVariant",
      "kind": "enum",
      "language": "Swift",
      "signature": "enum HeaderLayoutVariant: Equatable { case full, collapsedBand }",
      "owning_lane": "polish_resilience",
      "notes": "Driven independently by Dynamic Type size (XXL collapses to a slim band with text moved below onto plain background). Independent axis from color flattening \u2014 the two settings can be on simultaneously."
    }
  ]
}
```
